---
name: Skill Request
about: Suggest a new skill for the collection
title: "[skill] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Skill Name

Proposed name (e.g., ds-perf-audit, ds-migrate).

## Description

What would this skill do? What problem does it solve?

## Use Case

Describe a typical scenario where this skill would be useful.

## Example Rules / Checks

List a few example rules or checks this skill would perform:

- ...
- ...
- ...

## Overlap Check

Does this overlap with any existing skill? If so, how would it differ?
